text:
Created attachment 215752
patch for 4.4.0-rc9 (svn cp of mongodb42)

svn cp of mongodb42

* -use-system-boost does not compile; disabled for now
* mongodb build system now installs into ${WRKSRC}/build/install, so do-install needs its own commands.

- portlint ok
- build and run tested on 12.1/aarch64
